text:
Created attachment 255950
mount_nfs options

I am creating a pNFS cluster based on AWS EC2 Graviton2 and using it from a similar platform. When mounting occurs with the pnfs option, the creation (or writing to a non-existent) file is accompanied by an error and the application crashes, but the file is created.
If monitoring occurs without the pnfs option, everything works
